_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Next.js
author: support@nyxel.my.id
description: Host a Next.js application with auto-update, private repo support, both dev/production modes, optional Cloudflare Tunnel, and configurable package manager.
startup: bash -c "mkdir -p /home/container/.pterodactyl && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Synxx12/nyxel-eggs/main/eggs/nextjs/entrypoint.sh -o /home/container/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh || { echo '[EGG] Failed to download entrypoint!'; exit 1; } && chmod +x /home/container/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh && bash /home/container/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh"

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Next.js Installation Script — nyxel

set -e

apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y git curl jq file unzip make gcc g++ python3 python3-dev libtool

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.pterodactyl

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Synxx12/nyxel-eggs/main/eggs/nextjs/entrypoint.sh -o /mnt/server/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh
chmod +x /mnt/server/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh
echo "[INSTALL] entrypoint.sh downloaded to .pterodactyl/"

cd /mnt/server

if [ -n "${GIT_URL}" ]; then
  if [ -n "${USERNAME}" ] && [ -n "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    GIT_URL="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo ${GIT_URL} | sed 's|https://||')"
  fi

  if [ -d /mnt/server/.git ]; then
    echo "[INSTALL] Git repo already present — pulling latest..."
    git reset --hard
    git pull
  else
    echo "[INSTALL] Wiping directory and cloning fresh..."
    find /mnt/server -mindepth 1 -not -path '/mnt/server/.pterodactyl*' -delete 2>/dev/null || true
    if [ -z "${GIT_BRANCH}" ]; then
      git clone "${GIT_URL}" /tmp/repo_clone
    else
      git clone --single-branch --branch "${GIT_BRANCH}" "${GIT_URL}" /tmp/repo_clone
    fi
    cp -a /tmp/repo_clone/. /mnt/server/
    rm -rf /tmp/repo_clone
  fi

  if [ -f /mnt/server/package.json ]; then
    echo "[INSTALL] Installing Node.js dependencies..."
    cd /mnt/server
    PM="${PACKAGE_MANAGER:-auto}"
    if [ "$PM" = "auto" ]; then
      if [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then PM="pnpm";
      elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then PM="yarn";
      else PM="npm"; fi
    fi
    case "$PM" in
      pnpm)
        npm install -g pnpm --quiet
        pnpm install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || pnpm install
        ;;
      yarn)
        npm install -g yarn --quiet
        yarn install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || yarn install
        ;;
      *)
        if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci; else npm install; fi
        ;;
    esac
  fi
else
  echo "[INSTALL] GIT_URL is empty — skipping clone. Upload your project files via File Manager."
fi

echo "[INSTALL] Done."
exit 0

variables.name: Git Repository URL
variables.description: HTTPS URL to your Git repository (e.g. https://github.com/user/repo). Leave empty to skip cloning — you can upload project files manually via the File Manager.

variables.name: Git Branch
variables.description: Branch to clone and run (e.g. main, master, production). Leave empty to use the repository default branch.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Set to 1 to pull the latest commits from the repository every time the server starts. Set to 0 to disable.

variables.name: Git Username
variables.description: GitHub/GitLab username for private repositories. Leave empty for public repos.

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description: Personal access token for private repositories (https://github.com/settings/tokens). Requires at least 'repo' scope. Leave empty for public repos.

variables.name: Run Environment
variables.description: Set to 'production' to build and run a fully optimized Next.js build (next build + next start). Set to 'development' for hot-reload dev mode (next dev). Recommended: production for live sites.

variables.name: Package Manager
variables.description: Package manager to use for installing dependencies. Set to 'auto' to detect automatically from lockfile (pnpm-lock.yaml -> pnpm, yarn.lock -> yarn, otherwise npm). Options: auto, npm, pnpm, yarn.

variables.name: Build Command
variables.description: Custom build command override. Leave empty to use the default 'next build'. Use this for monorepos or custom setups (e.g. 'turbo build', 'next build --experimental-turbo').

variables.name: Cloudflare Tunnel Token
variables.description: Optional. Cloudflare Tunnel token from your Zero Trust dashboard (Networks > Tunnels > Configure > Run token). Leave empty to disable the tunnel.
